MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry F. Dorfman; Clerk: B. Paredes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Bay Property Group is present. Represented by Daniel Bornstein.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Angel Law is present.
Attorney Raymond Bolanos appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ZADIK SHAPIRO, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Sep-09-2013 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
